summary: EXP-407 closes ISS-1643. Targeted footnote (i) replacement in SEC-4.2.7a (section id p4-427-station-coverage, part4.html) — replaces the existing "weakly non-linear ... corrected ratio still exceeds 90× ... kill unaffected" hand-wave with an exact two-reading analysis: (a) wholesale rescaling makes R_p ∝ h_Moon exact and requires h_Moon = 246,401 km AND h_Sun = 557,466 km (97.24× the dome's published values); (b) under partial scaling with h_Sun fixed at the published 5,733 km and R_Moon tracking the angular-size constraint, the finite-source formula R_p = R_M + (R_S + R_M)·h_M/(h_S − h_M) diverges as h_Moon → h_Sun, with R_p = 4,084 km requiring h_Moon = 5,660 km (Moon within 73 km of the firmament Sun itself). Calibration R_S ≈ 26.5 km, R_M ≈ 11.7 km derived to match the inherited R_p = 42 km baseline under angular-size match. Conclusion upgrades from "kill unaffected" to "unaffected under linear charity, strengthened under exact geometry" — the dome has no parameter set that produces a 4,084-km penumbra. Single paragraph replacement (51→155 words). No DATA blob, layer count, rate, or classifier touched; tests should remain green. patch_type targeted-sentence-replacement; decider can apply via the standard sed/python find-and-replace path. review_class declared deep-attack (curmudgeon should re-review on the math, not just the prose).
